problem id: a19734b3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01101010 -> 00110110
  10111010 -> 00101011
  01100000 -> 11110111
  11000100 -> 01101111
  00000111 -> 11011111
  00111011 -> 01011011
  10010001 -> 10001101
  00101100 -> 01111010

query: 01001110
predicted answer: 10110110
